_comment: Central cluster configuration — single source of truth for hosts/ports + the self-update source. Edit here, not in code. No secrets: self-update pulls from the PUBLIC GitHub repo's raw endpoint (update_repo/update_branch), which needs no token.
_discovery: controller_host defaults to "auto": the worker finds the controller by UDP broadcast on discovery_port and configures itself — a fresh clone needs NO edit here. It retries every 30s until a controller answers. Put an IP here instead for anything broadcast cannot cross (subnets/VLANs/VPN); an unreachable static IP also falls back to discovery. cluster_id "" = join whichever controller answers (any worker on the LAN may join, which is intended); set it on a controller AND its workers only if you must keep two fleets on one LAN apart.
